title: Tympanic pulser
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Tympanic pulser''' was a synthesized percussion instrument developed by the [[Ruurian/Legends|Ruurians]] of [[Ruuria/Legends|Ruuria]]. It was worn rather than held, allowing the user to play other instruments as well, assuming they had more than one set of arms.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1984-12-XX -->''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''

[[Category:Percussion musical instruments]]
